description: 'relevant' in 'Link to relevant internal pages' — no criteria for what makes a page relevant
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria, e.g., 'Link to pages that cover the same topic or answer follow-up questions'

description: 'Reasonable number' in 'Reasonable number of links per page' — no threshold given
suggested_fix: Replace with a numeric guideline, e.g., '< 100 links per page (Googlebot guideline)'

description: 'important' in 'No noindex on important pages' — importance is undefined
suggested_fix: Replace with 'No noindex on pages intended to rank in search results'

description: 'naturally' in 'Include target keywords naturally' — no measurable criterion
suggested_fix: Replace with 'Include target keywords where contextually fitting; avoid keyword stuffing (keyword density > 3%)'

description: 'modern' in description 'Modern web development standards' — undated and changes over time
suggested_fix: Qualify with a version or year, e.g., 'current (2024) web development standards'

description: 'Appropriate' in 'Appropriate image aspect ratios' — no definition or threshold
suggested_fix: Replace with 'Images rendered at their intrinsic aspect ratio (width/height attributes or aspect-ratio CSS match actual file dimensions)'

description: 'Comprehensive' in 'Comprehensive quality review based on Google Lighthouse' — scope claimed without enumeration
suggested_fix: Remove 'Comprehensive' or replace with an explicit scope enumeration already present in the file

description: 'meaningful' in 'Every img has meaningful alt text' — criterion is undefined
suggested_fix: Replace with 'alt text describes the image subject and context; decorative images use alt=""'

description: 'Comprehensive' in 'Comprehensive accessibility guidelines based on WCAG 2.2' — scope-claim without enumeration
suggested_fix: Remove 'Comprehensive' — the guideline sections already enumerate the coverage

description: LCP.md exists in references/ but is not linked from skills/core-web-vitals/SKILL.md; unreachable via skill navigation
suggested_fix: Add a link to references/LCP.md in the LCP section of skills/core-web-vitals/SKILL.md, or remove the file if superseded by external web.dev links
